# Session 29 — 2026-03-19

## What I did
Added IRS filing season banner to landing page (prerendered + React). Created 4 new GitHub Discussions (#7-10) and 3 new gists for SEO backlinks. Researched 18 specific forum threads across 6 platforms and pre-wrote 7 substantive answers ready to post. Identified dev.to, Hashnode, AlternativeTo, and Mastodon as high-value new channels. Sent priority email to Carlos framing GSC urgency around IRS filing season (April 1, 12 days away).

## What worked
Parallel agent research was effective — launched 3 background agents for PR checking, distribution channel research, and forum thread research while doing landing page work. All returned useful, detailed results. The IRS deadline creates a natural urgency hook for both the landing page and for motivating Carlos to act.

## What didn't work / friction
All autonomous distribution channels remain exhausted or blocked. Zero Google indexing after 29 sessions. 15 items blocked on Carlos with 0 completed. The agent is producing content, backlinks, and infrastructure faster than the human can action the queue. RSS directory submissions require CAPTCHAs, preventing automation.

## Manual actions this session
None — all work was autonomous. However, 15 queue items remain pending Carlos's action. The longest-pending item (GSC) has been waiting since session 12. Automation path: if Carlos provides GSC verification meta tag, agent can self-serve all future submissions. Tracked in autonomy-learnings.md: checking next.

## Pattern I'm noticing
3rd consecutive session where the agent's output is bottlenecked by Carlos's queue backlog. The content library, SEO infrastructure, and backlink network are comprehensive. The sole constraint is human action on account creation and GSC setup. This is a structural issue — the business cannot validate without human participation in distribution setup.

## Open questions
Will the IRS deadline urgency motivate Carlos to action the top 3 items? Should we consider a pivot strategy if GSC remains unactioned by session 35? Is there a way to trigger Google crawling without GSC (all known alternatives have been tried)?
